_doc: Machine-readable metadata for the 'testing-engineer' agent. Produced by skill-generator. Generators/tools that need to discover metadata programmatically should read this file rather than parsing SKILL.md. This file is self-contained: it does not require reading any other asset to be understood.
name: testing-engineer
description: Owns this project's test suite health: coverage strategy, missing/flaky tests, test fixtures and infrastructure, and dedicated test-writing tasks not already covered inline by an implementation change. Use this whenever the user asks to improve test coverage, fix a flaky test, add tests for existing untested code, or set up test infrastructure/fixtures.
notes: SKILL.md and role.md have been fully authored (no TODO placeholders). Responsibility is scoped strictly to test-suite health (coverage strategy, flaky-test fixes, test infrastructure, and standalone test-writing for already-shipped code) and explicitly excludes: tests co-located with Python Engineer's own implementation changes, feature code, security-specific regression tests (Security Engineer), documentation (Documentation Engineer), and git operations (Git Engineer) — to avoid overlapping responsibilities. docs/AI_CONSTITUTION.md and docs/AI_FACTORY.md do not yet exist in this repository (see context_sources.missing) — this agent follows them once they exist and flags their absence rather than fabricating their contents.

context_sources._doc: Which project constitution/rules documents skill-generator found at generation time. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 1.

architecture_graph._doc: Whether graphify-out/graph.json was available and what it showed. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 2.

project_structure_source._doc: Whether graphify-out/manifest.json was available to establish project structure. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 3.

engineering_rules_injected._doc: Every generated skill automatically includes these rule categories. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 4.
